title: carex reniformis
intro: Carex reniformis, also known as the kidney sedge, is a perennial plant species within the family Cyperaceae. It is native to North America and is often found in wet environments such as marshes and swamps. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and diuretic effects. The health benefits of Carex reniformis include treating urinary tract infections, reducing swelling and pain, and promoting kidney function, and it can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures.
